item.title: JackPittBrooke: Jack Pitt-Brooke @JackPittBrooke · 3h Rutter's 94th min equaliser makes it 2-2. Spurs still winless in the PL in 2026. P
item.description: Jack Pitt-Brooke @JackPittBrooke · 3h Rutter's 94th min equaliser makes it 2-2. Spurs still winless in the PL in 2026. Players look devastated having come so close to what could have been a turning point. 16 7 236 23 mil

item.title: JackPittBrooke: Jack Pitt-Brooke @JackPittBrooke · 2min En respuesta a @JackPittBrooke Obviously the Rutter goal was a very painful mom
item.description: Jack Pitt-Brooke @JackPittBrooke · 2min En respuesta a @JackPittBrooke Obviously the Rutter goal was a very painful moment. But at the same time that was probably Spurs' best PL performance of the season. They looked like themselves again. They got on the ball, attacked and worked as a team. 1 3 267

item.title:
BenCrellin: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 4h Pitchforks in my mentions!
I didn’t pick JP (or DCL or Semenyo) because I wanted to gamb
item.description:
Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 4h Pitchforks in my mentions!
I didn’t pick JP (or DCL or Semenyo) because I wanted to gamble on my FH without going Halandless.
I put JP first on my bench because I wanted some bench security in case one of my starting XI picked up an illness/injury that ruled them out for Mostrar más Cita Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 12h Here's my Gameweek 33 Free Hit team
Captain: Haaland Total points: 1,912 Rank: 80.9k
I haven't owned Semenyo or Joao Pedro all season - and I've chosen to keep fading them on FH this week when they're both excellent options!
Good luck everyone! 88 24 246 219 mil
